title: RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT - 211info
text: MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a residential program offering co-occurring mental health, trauma, and substance use recovery services. Programming is centered around building skills in emotional regulation, resiliency, conflict resolution, and communication. 7000 SW Varns Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 749-0200 528 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 749-0200 Ext: 528 Main phone Admissions Main phone (503) 749-0200 ext 528 Admissions Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must have a referral for either mental health and/or substance abuse residential level of care. Call or visit website for more information. FEES: Accepts most private insurance plans DOCUMENTS: Referral for level of care LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 78 Services: Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Adolescents If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRONA RECOVERY
